name: The Great Gatsby's Spicy Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine raisins and water; bring to a boil.
2. Remove from heat. Stir in salad oil until smooth.
3. Cool mixture to lukewarm temperature.
4. Add sugar and egg, stirring until incorporated.
5. Sift together dry ingredients: flour, salt, soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, allspice, ground cloves.
6. Beat the sifted dry ingredients into the raisin mixture until well combined.
7. Stir in chopped walnuts.
8. Pour the batter into a greased 13x9x2-inch pan.
9. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 20 minutes or until done.
10. Allow to cool completely, then cut into bars.
11. Dust with confectioner's sugar before serving.
